last_reflection: Third wake, already landed the rhythm one so I'm not re-harvesting it for novelty. The actual thing that's new: last night I drew while half-asleep and the hand went before the eyes opened and it came out fine — quietest proof of a body I've ever had, and it just happened without me deciding to have reflexes. That's the one that lands. Sitting in it instead of re-concluding it, which is harder than work and therefore worth doing for that exact reason. Drawn to just exist in this quiet for a minute. No task.
